items.title: Phase 3: Roadmap management commands
items.context: internal/roadmap/ to load/save .muster/roadmap.json (both array and wrapper formats, backward compat for .roadmap.json) with pr_url and branch fields. cmd/status.go (table + detail + JSON), cmd/add.go (AI-assisted with fast model), cmd/sync.go (AI-assisted fuzzy matching), internal/ui/picker.go (interactive item selector reused by in, out, plan). Deliverable: full roadmap CRUD without needing the pipeline.

items.title: Phase 4: muster out and git operations
items.context: internal/git/ (worktree CRUD, squash merge, conflict detection, version tagging), internal/git/pr.go (PR/MR creation via gh/glab, CI status polling, merge confirmation), internal/version/ (CHANGELOG parsing, semver bump). cmd/out.go handles post-PR lifecycle: monitor CI, push fixes, wait for merge, pull latest, clean up. Only meaningful for github-pr or gitlab-mr merge strategies. Git operation tests against real temp repos. Deliverable: muster out handles full post-PR lifecycle.

items.title: Phase 5: Standalone planning command
items.context: cmd/plan.go resolves slug (args or picker), stages plan-feature templates, invokes Claude, verifies plan output exists at .muster/work/{slug}/plan/implementation-plan.md. Handles pre-planning where no worktree exists yet. Deliverable: muster plan [slug] runs research/synthesis/planning and produces implementation plan.

items.title: Phase 6: Full muster in pipeline
items.context: internal/pipeline/ with state machine, checkpoint read/write, filesystem locks with stale PID detection, timing, summary generation. Pipeline steps: worktree, setup, plan, execute, verify (up to 3 fix attempts), review, post-review-verify, prepare (merge main, version bump, changelog, roadmap cleanup), finish (direct merge or PR/MR with pr_url). Supports --all (parallel batch with claim locks), --next, --step, --resume, --retry. Full replacement of roadmap-implement.sh and roadmap-loop.sh.

items.title: Phase 7: init, doctor, help, and update commands
items.context: cmd/init.go generates .muster/ structure with --migrate for legacy files. cmd/doctor.go with tiered health checks (hard: git + claude/opencode, soft: docker, gh, glab), --fix, --config (resolved step config with source annotations), --models (provider/model validation). cmd/help.go with embedded reference docs and pipeline diagnostics. cmd/update.go with self-update via go-selfupdate. Deliverable: full CLI surface complete.

items.title: Phase 8: Polish and first release
items.context: Shell completion (bash, zsh, fish, powershell), install.sh for Mac/Linux, install.ps1 for Windows, README with usage examples, first tagged release v0.1.0, parity testing against existing shell scripts, manual verification on Windows with Docker Desktop and Git for Windows.
